summary: Iteration 26 — Public Announcements + Drivers Roster + Dynamic Sitemap + GoogleAdsConversion stub. Backend: 27/27 pytest PASS at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration26_announcements_drivers_sitemap.py. Coverage: (A) Announcements public — GET /api/announcements returns {banner:[...], homepage:[...]} (banner capped at 1), only active+in-window items shown; deactivating a row immediately removes it from both feeds AND makes its /api/announcements/<slug> return 404. (B) Public slug — GET /api/announcements/<slug> returns the row, 404 on bad slug. (C) Admin CRUD /api/admin/announcements — 401 without bearer on GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE; auto-generates kebab-case slug from title (verified `test26-headline-...`); duplicate-title creates appended `-2` slug so slugs stay unique; PATCH 200 updates body; DELETE returns {deleted:true}, second delete returns 404. (D) Sitemap — GET /api/sitemap.xml returns application/xml (text starts with `<?xml`, contains `<urlset` + at least one `/news/<slug>` entry alongside the homepage URL); lastmod derives from announcement updated_at/created_at. (E) Drivers — 401 without bearer on all 4 verbs; POST validates required name+phone via Pydantic (returns 422 when either missing); GET list contains created rows; PATCH 200 updates vehicle; PATCH 404 on unknown id; DELETE 200 then 404. (F) Regression smoke — /api/options 200, /api/admin/login still returns requires_2fa:true, /api/quote still routes (200/400/422 acceptable, no 5xx). Frontend Playwright: (1) Homepage `/` loads, AnnouncementBanner renders, 'Latest news' section visible, /api/announcements call returns banner_count=1 + homepage_count=1. (2) /news/<slug> renders, document.title updates to '<title> · TuranEliteLimo', <script data-news-jsonld> is injected (394 chars), body text length 601 chars. Bad slug /news/bad-... shows '404 — Announcement not found' page. (3) Admin dashboard at /admin (after localStorage token+navigation) — both new tabs render: data-testid='tab-announcements' + data-testid='tab-drivers' present. (4) Announcements tab — 'new-announcement-btn' opens dialog with title/body/save testids; saved title appears in row list (announcement-row-* testid) and in DOM after reload. (5) Drivers tab — 'new-driver-btn' opens 'Add driver' dialog with data-testid='driver-name-field' / 'driver-phone-field' / 'driver-vehicle-field' / 'driver-plate-field' / 'save-driver'; create works, edit-driver-{id} updates name (verified 'TEST26 Roster Driver EDITED' in DOM after save), delete-driver-{id} present. (6) AssignDriverDialog 'driver-roster-select' testid confirmed at source AssignDriverDialog.jsx:170 — runtime open requires drilling into a booking-detail modal which (per iter25 design feedback) remains the only path; no top-level assign-driver button on booking row testids. (7) GoogleAdsConversion no-op — visited /pay/<paid-booking-id>: NO script[data-gads-loaded], NO googletagmanager.com/gtag/js script injected, window.gtag is undefined. Env vars REACT_APP_GADS_CONVERSION_ID / _LABEL are not set in /app/frontend/.env so component correctly returns null without side-effects.

issues: React console warning: `value` prop on `input` should not be null. Triggered when opening the edit-driver dialog for a driver with NULL optional fields (email / plate / vehicle). Backend stores these as None, frontend Input receives `value={driver.email}` which is null — should fallback to empty string via `value={driver.email ?? ''}` in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/DriversTab.jsx. Functionally harmless, but noisy in console and Strict-Mode will eventually error.

AssignDriverDialog trigger is still buried inside the booking-detail modal — same UX feedback from iter25. With the new driver roster ready, dispatch flow would benefit from a top-row 'Assign driver' button (with 'Pick from roster' visible immediately) without needing to scroll past Wait-Time / Mid-Trip-Stops / Damages sections.

action_items: (Nit) DriversTab.jsx — coerce optional driver fields to '' on dialog open to silence React null-value warning. Example: `setEditing({ name: d.name||'', phone: d.phone||'', email: d.email||'', plate: d.plate||'', vehicle: d.vehicle||'', active: d.active ?? true })`.

(UX) Surface 'Assign driver' as a top-row action button on confirmed booking rows so the new roster dropdown is reachable without scrolling through the row-detail modal. Iter25's same feedback remains open.

(Optional) Consider returning Content-Type: application/xml; charset=utf-8 with a <?xml-stylesheet ...?> reference in the sitemap so it's pleasantly readable in browser. Current output is valid XML and Googlebot-acceptable.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L2024 slug-uniqueness loop uses `find_one({slug: slug}, {_id:0})` which is correct, but on a heavily-trafficked admin it could insert-race two simultaneous creates with the same title. A unique index on announcements.slug would harden this. Non-blocking.

server.py L2048 PATCH regenerates slug from title on EVERY title change. This breaks already-shared /news/<old-slug> URLs (and the previously emitted sitemap entry). Consider keeping the slug stable after first publish OR adding an old_slug → new_slug 301 redirect.

server.py L1972 _announcement_active_now compares ISO dates as strings (`today < starts_at`). Works only because both sides are 'YYYY-MM-DD' prefixed; if an admin enters 'starts_at' as a full ISO timestamp ('2026-01-15T10:00:00Z'), the comparison still works lexicographically but the body only checks the date — the time portion is silently ignored. Document the field as date-only OR truncate via [:10] on read.
server.py L2160 sitemap is unauthenticated and unpaginated — fine today, but if announcements grow past a few thousand active rows, consider sitemap index splitting. Non-blocking.
GoogleAdsConversion.jsx is exemplary — env-gated, sessionStorage de-dupe by transaction_id, async gtag.js load, fires only when payment_status === 'paid'. ✓

Announcement.jsx correctly injects + cleans up the JSON-LD script via useEffect, document.title is restored on unmount (assumed — confirm by inspecting return cleanup). 404 fallback page is well-styled and on-brand.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all data-testids present and reachable; AnnouncementsTab CRUD round-trips through API, DriversTab CRUD round-trips, /news/<slug> SEO meta + JSON-LD verified, GoogleAdsConversion confirmed no-op under unset env vars. AssignDriverDialog roster-select testid confirmed at source (runtime trigger buried as noted).

test_credentials: Admin support@turanelitelimo.com / TuronAdmin@2025 with 2FA bypass (Mongo admin_2fa_challenges + bcrypt('123456')) per /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Created via API: 3 TEST26 announcements (2 active, 1 inactive, 1 deleted at test end) + 1 TEST26 driver row (created/edited/persisted). Created via UI: 1 additional TEST26 announcement ('TEST26 UI Announcement <ts>') + 1 driver ('TEST26 Roster Driver EDITED'). Left in DB per instructions — main agent may sweep TEST26* rows when done.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter26 features (announcements, drivers roster, sitemap, gads stub) are green. Regression suite /app/backend/tests/test_iteration26_announcements_drivers_sitemap.py self-bootstraps (loads /app/frontend/.env + /app/backend/.env, does 2FA bypass). To reach the AssignDriverDialog from UI: click a confirmed booking row → scroll the row-detail modal past Wait-Time / Mid-Trip-Stops / Damages sections → 'Assign driver' button is there. The data-testid='driver-roster-select' SelectTrigger renders inside that dialog and pickFromRoster() in AssignDriverDialog.jsx prefills name/phone/email/plate/vehicle from the chosen driver. To test gads conversion firing path, set REACT_APP_GADS_CONVERSION_ID + REACT_APP_GADS_CONVERSION_LABEL in /app/frontend/.env, restart frontend, visit /pay/<paid-id> — gtag script should inject and a 'conversion' event fire exactly once per transaction_id (sessionStorage de-duped).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature verification iteration, no bug RCA needed.
